title: LEGO Star Wars Lightsabers
description: Replaces Swords with 3D Animated  Lightsabers made of LEGO Bricks
body:
This Texture Pack Replaces Swords with 3D Animated LEGO Lightsabers, Their Hilts Colors try to match the material the Sword is made of.
![First Person Lightsaber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87140222d617b819c3a126909ba1c47db702af56.png)![All Lightsabers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/549afe28f48e70df3f9cd6a7cc87449a5eb8da20.png)![Lightsabers in Third Person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406a097879a74d7c7c6a5e560ac3cd381b68f7f5.png)
